channel.title: Site Redesign Log on Reflections
channel.description: Recent content in Site Redesign Log on Reflections

item.title: Session 1: Spec Review with Claude Desktop
item.description:
Claude I’ll start by exploring your current site and codebase to understand what exists before asking questions.

Ran two agents Task Explore current Hugo blog structure Excellent! Now let me compile the comprehensive report. I have thoroughly explored the Hugo blog structure.

Comprehensive Exploration Report: Hugo Blog at /Users/ann/dev/myblog

Show less

1. OVERALL DIRECTORY STRUCTURE

myblog/
├── .github/workflows/          # GitHub Actions CI/CD
├── content/                    # Blog content (source of truth)
│   ├── about.md              # About page

…..
